emiratesid.ae.readersmgt
Class ReaderManagement

java.lang.Object
  emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.ReaderManagement

public class ReaderManagement
extends java.lang.Object

Copyright (c) 2010 LOGICA. All Rights Reserved.
Encapsulates all the PCSC details regarding the reader and the smart card connections

Since:
1.6
Version:
2.0
Author:
Hakim SEBSSI

Constructor Summary
ReaderManagement()
           
 
Method Summary
 void closeContext()
          Close the current established context and release all resources
 void disconnectAllReaders()
          disconnect all discovered PCSC readers
 void discoverReaders()
          Discover all PCSC readers, connect to each available card, and extract cards ATR, set the type of the card
 void establishContext()
          Establish a context with the operating system Smart Card library, to start using the smart card functions
 long getContext()
          retrieves the current established context handle
 PCSCReader[] getReaders()
          Return all PCSC readers, a prior call to discoverReaders is mandatory
 PCSCReader selectIDCardReader()
          Retrieves the first PCSCReader object of a UAE smart card from the discovered list of readers
 PCSCReader selectReaderByATR(char[] ATR)
          Retrieves the first PCSCReader object from the discovered list of readers that matches a specific ATR
 PCSCReader selectReaderByName(java.lang.String readerName)
          Retrieves the first PCSCReader object from the discovered list of readers that matches a specific name
 PCSCReader selectSAM()
          Retrieves the first PCSCReader object of a SAM card from the discovered list of readers
 PCSCReader selectTestIDCardReader()
          Retrieves the first PCSCReader object of a test card from the discovered list of readers
 void setReaders(PCSCReader[] readers)
           
 
Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object
equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait
 

Constructor Detail

ReaderManagement

public ReaderManagement()
Method Detail

setReaders

public void setReaders(PCSCReader[] readers)

getContext

public long getContext()
retrieves the current established context handle

Returns:
context handle

getReaders

public PCSCReader[] getReaders()
Return all PCSC readers, a prior call to discoverReaders is mandatory

Returns:
array of PCSCReader objects in connected status

discoverReaders

public void discoverReaders()
                     throws MiddlewareException
Discover all PCSC readers, connect to each available card, and extract cards ATR, set the type of the card

Throws:
MiddlewareException

selectReaderByATR

public PCSCReader selectReaderByATR(char[] ATR)
Retrieves the first PCSCReader object from the discovered list of readers that matches a specific ATR

Parameters:
ATR - ATR used to match PCSCReader
Returns:
PCSCReader object if found, null otherwise

selectReaderByName

public PCSCReader selectReaderByName(java.lang.String readerName)
Retrieves the first PCSCReader object from the discovered list of readers that matches a specific name

Parameters:
readerName - used to match PCSCReader
Returns:
PCSCReader object if found, null otherwise

selectTestIDCardReader

public PCSCReader selectTestIDCardReader()
Retrieves the first PCSCReader object of a test card from the discovered list of readers

Returns:
PCSCReader object if found, null otherwise

selectIDCardReader

public PCSCReader selectIDCardReader()
Retrieves the first PCSCReader object of a UAE smart card from the discovered list of readers

Returns:
PCSCReader object if found, null otherwise

selectSAM

public PCSCReader selectSAM()
Retrieves the first PCSCReader object of a SAM card from the discovered list of readers

Returns:
PCSCReader object if SAM found, null otherwise

disconnectAllReaders

public void disconnectAllReaders()
disconnect all discovered PCSC readers

establishContext

public void establishContext()
                      throws MiddlewareException
Establish a context with the operating system Smart Card library, to start using the smart card functions

Throws:
MiddlewareException

closeContext

public void closeContext()
                  throws MiddlewareException
Close the current established context and release all resources

Throws:
MiddlewareException
